{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Emperor's cloudship
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Emperor's cloudship]] was frozen near the portal in a purple haze.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
